title: Feature Request: Fit entire timeline/gantt in window
excerpt: It would be helpful to be able to choose a scale of “fit in window” on a Gantt chart or timeline, to enable easy display in a presentation, conf call, screenshot, etc. Thank you for your consideration.

posts.author: MonDude (MonDude)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be helpful to be able to choose a scale of “fit in window” on a Gantt chart or timeline, to enable easy display in a presentation, conf call, screenshot, etc. Thank you for your consideration.
